name: AT&T INC.
summary: AT&T Inc. is a leading global telecommunications and technology services holding company. It provides wireless services (4G LTE and 5G), fiber broadband, fixed wireless access (AT&T Internet Air), and wireline telecom to consumers and businesses. Key offerings include Mobility (postpaid, prepaid, reseller), Consumer Wireline (AT&T Fiber), Business Wireline (ethernet, IP Voice, managed services), and wireless services in Mexico under the Latin America segment. AT&T also operates FirstNet, a broadband network dedicated to public safety.
